sentences.target: Le frigo, c'est le néant aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: Le frigo, c'est le néant aujourd'hui.
translations.en: The fridge is totally empty today.
translations.es: La nevera está completamente vacía hoy.
translations.de: Der Kühlschrank ist heute völlig leer.
translations.it: Il frigo oggi è completamente vuoto.
translations.pt: O frigorífico está completamente vazio hoje.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tủ lạnh trống trơn.
translations.nl: De koelkast is vandaag helemaal leeg.
translations.el: Το ψυγείο είναι σήμερα εντελώς άδειο.
translations.nb: Kjøleskapet er helt tomt i dag.
translations.sv: Kylskåpet är helt tomt i dag.
translations.da: Køleskabet er helt tomt i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は冷蔵庫が空っぽだ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (masc. sg.) introducing the noun 'frigo'; topicalized NP before the copular clause.
Common noun; head of the topicalized NP referring to the refrigerator.
Cliticized copular form ('ce' + 'est') linking the topic to the predicate nominal.
Definite article (masc. sg.) introducing the predicate noun.
Predicate nominal after the copula, meaning 'nothingness/void'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.

sentences.target: On attend, mais c'est le néant ici.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ atɑ̃ mɛ sɛ lə neɑ̃ isi/

translations.fr: On attend, mais c'est le néant ici.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ atɑ̃ mɛ sɛ lə neɑ̃ isi/
translations.en: We’re waiting, but there’s nothing here.
translations.es: Estamos esperando, pero aquí no hay nada.
translations.de: Wir warten, aber hier ist nichts.
translations.it: Aspettiamo, ma qui non c'è niente.
translations.ko: 우리는 기다리지만 여기에서는 아무 일도 일어나지 않는다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在等，但这里什么都没有。
translations.yue: 我哋喺度等，但呢度乜都冇。
translations.ru: Мы ждём, но здесь ничего нет.
translations.pt: Estamos à espera, mas aqui não há nada.
translations.he: אנחנו מחכים, אבל אין כאן כלום.
translations.tr: Bekliyoruz ama burada hiçbir şey yok.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đợi nhưng ở đây chẳng có gì.
translations.ar: نحن ننتظر، لكن لا يوجد شيء هنا.
translations.nl: We wachten, maar hier is niets.
translations.uk: Ми чекаємо, але тут нічого немає.
translations.hi: हम इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं, लेकिन यहाँ कुछ भी नहीं है.
translations.pl: Czekamy, ale tu nic nie ma.
translations.el: Περιμένουμε, αλλά εδώ δεν υπάρχει τίποτα.
translations.nb: Vi venter, men her er det ingenting.
translations.id: Kami menunggu, tapi di sini tidak ada apa-apa.
translations.sv: Vi väntar, men här finns inget.
translations.ro: Așteptăm, dar aici nu e nimic.
translations.da: Vi venter, men her er der ingenting.
translations.fi: Odotamme, mutta täällä ei ole mitään.
translations.ja: 待っているけど、ここには何もない。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (generic/colloquial 'we').
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person sg.) governed by 'On'.
Coordinating conjunction introducing a contrastive clause.
Cliticized copular form linking to the predicate nominal.
Definite article (masc. sg.) introducing the predicate noun.
Predicate nominal after the copula.
Locative adverb specifying place.

sentences.target: Ce soir, au bar, c'est le néant.
sentences.reading: /sə swaʁ o baʁ sɛ lə neɑ̃/

translations.fr: Ce soir, au bar, c'est le néant.
translations.ipa: /sə swaʁ o baʁ sɛ lə neɑ̃/
translations.en: Tonight at the bar, nothing’s happening.
translations.es: Esta noche en el bar no pasa nada.
translations.de: Heute Abend ist in der Bar nichts los.
translations.it: Stasera al bar non succede niente.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 바에서는 아무 일도 일어나지 않는다.
translations.zh-Hans: 今晚酒吧里什么都没发生。
translations.yue: 今晚喺酒吧乜都冇發生。
translations.ru: Сегодня вечером в баре ничего не происходит.
translations.pt: Esta noite no bar não se passa nada.
translations.tr: Bu akşam barda hiçbir şey olmuyor.
translations.vi: Tối nay ở quán bar chẳng có gì xảy ra.
translations.ar: هذا المساء في الحانة لا يحدث شيء.
translations.nl: Vanavond gebeurt er niets in de bar.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері в барі нічого не відбувається.
translations.hu: Ma este a bárban semmi sem történik.
translations.hi: आज रात बार में कुछ भी नहीं हो रहा है.
translations.pl: Dziś wieczorem w barze nic się nie dzieje.
translations.el: Απόψε στο μπαρ δεν γίνεται τίποτα.
translations.nb: I kveld skjer det ingenting på baren.
translations.id: Malam ini di bar tidak ada yang terjadi.
translations.sv: I kväll händer inget på baren.
translations.ro: Diseară la bar nu se întâmplă nimic.
translations.cs: Dnes večer se v baru nic neděje.
translations.da: I aften sker der ingenting på baren.
translations.fi: Tänä iltana baarissa ei tapahdu mitään.
translations.ja: 今夜、バーでは何も起きていない。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner modifying 'soir' (temporal NP).
Head of the temporal NP; functions as a time adjunct.
Fused preposition + article introducing the locative complement.
Noun complement of the preposition (location).
Cliticized copular form linking to the predicate nominal.
Definite article (masc. sg.) introducing the predicate noun.
Predicate nominal after the copula.

sentences.target: Dans ma boîte mail, c'est le néant.
sentences.reading: /dɑ̃ ma bwat mɛl sɛ lə neɑ̃/

translations.fr: Dans ma boîte mail, c'est le néant.
translations.ipa: /dɑ̃ ma bwat mɛl sɛ lə neɑ̃/
translations.es: Mi bandeja de entrada está vacía.
translations.it: La mia casella di posta in arrivo è vuota.
translations.pt: A minha caixa de entrada está vazia.
translations.vi: Hộp thư đến của tôi trống rỗng.

tokens.explanation: Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Possessive determiner (1st person sg., fem. sg.) modifying 'boîte'.
Noun; head of the NP inside the prepositional phrase.
Noun modifying 'boîte' (compound noun: 'boîte mail').
Cliticized copular form linking to the predicate nominal.
Definite article (masc. sg.) introducing the predicate noun.
Predicate nominal after the copula.
